🎵 Hopelessly Devoted To You
May 27, 2026 · Today ✨
My Dearest Elysia,

On this special day, I want you to know something that lives in every quiet corner of my heart —

You are the person I didn't know I was waiting for. The one who made me realize that some stories need a second chapter to truly begin.

"Second chances are the universe's way of saying it wasn't finished writing our story yet." And I'm so grateful ours continued.

Finding our way back to each other was terrifying and beautiful all at once. But Elysia — every single moment of uncertainty was worth it, because it led me right back to you.

You make ordinary Tuesday mornings feel like something. You make silence feel comfortable. You make me want to be better, just by being you.

Today I'm not just celebrating the holiday. I'm celebrating the fact that you exist, that our paths crossed, and that somehow — beautifully, impossibly — we found each other again.

I promise to never take a single moment with you for granted. To always watch your reels. To always pick up when you call. To always choose you, every single day.

Thank you for being my person, Elysia. Thank you for giving us another chance. 🌹

Always and with every beat of my heart,
Yours 💕

me trying to be romantic vs. the anxiety inside me 😅

"if you keep scrolling past my reels without watching them...
this is what's coming for you." 😤🐱
